Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xE151 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Precision (Digital Monastery - 2022).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0a00 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Precision (Digital Monastery - 2022).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0900 which:
1. Copies 256 bytes of data from $0940 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400 (this block contains the data for the press space sprite on the loading screen) 2. Sets up the correct VICII settings to display the loading screen 3. Initialises the loading music by calling the routine at $1000
